skills.name: cpanel-health-check
skills.description: Check cPanel server health: services, SSL certificates, disk usage, ports, Nginx errors. Use when diagnosing server issues or performing routine health checks.

skills.name: cpanel-firewall-audit
skills.description: Audit CSF firewall rules, verify required ports are open, check recent blocks, and optionally restart CSF. Use when investigating connectivity issues or security events.

skills.name: cpanel-ssl-management
skills.description: Manage SSL certificates via cPanel UAPI: list, check coverage, trigger AutoSSL renewal, install custom certs. Use when SSL certificates are expiring or missing.

skills.name: cpanel-dns-management
skills.description: Manage DNS records via cPanel UAPI: list zones, add A/CNAME/MX/TXT records, delete records, lookup. Use when configuring domains or troubleshooting DNS.

skills.name: stx-health-check
skills.description: Check StarlingX AIO server health: Kubernetes nodes, OpenStack services, IPMI, containerd. Use when verifying STX infrastructure or preparing for deployments.

skills.name: nginx-proxy-management
skills.description: Deploy and manage Nginx reverse proxy configs for cPanel. Includes resolver-safe proxy_pass patterns to prevent total outage from DNS failures.

skills.name: macos-dev-environment
skills.description: Verify macOS developer environment: CLI tools, SSH keys, LaunchAgents, brew services, git health. Use for onboarding or troubleshooting local setup.

skills.name: security-scanning
skills.description: Run security scans with Semgrep (SAST) and OpenSSF Scorecard against the repository. Detects credential leaks, shell injection, and repo health issues.
